title: SQLInsert Format improvement to also include create schema query
description:
### Company or project name
To replicate a sample of an already existing table.
### Describe the improvement
Hello there,
I find the SQLInsert format very useful, when wanting to do some local tests using some live data from a remote clickhouse instance. It helps to initialize the local instance with some sample/test data. However it can be of use to have a setting so that the generated result also includes the Create Table schema.
For example:
```sql
SELECT
1 AS a,
'2' AS colB
FORMAT SQLInsert
SETTINGS output_format_sql_insert_include_table_schema=true
/* Can Return
CREATE TABLE table
(
`a` Int32,
`colB` String
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY tuple()
;
INSERT INTO table (`a`, `colB`) VALUES (1, '2')
;
*/
```
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
N/A
### How to reproduce
Support the following setting `output_format_sql_insert_include_table_schema` when using `FORMAT SQLInsert`
```sql
SELECT
1 AS a,
'2' AS colB
FORMAT SQLInsert
SETTINGS output_format_sql_insert_include_table_schema=true
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), age TINYINT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT, user_id INT, amount DOUBLE, order_date DATE);
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.age > 25;
